description:
🇰🇭 Support Cambodian Communities Here:
https://www.cambodianmuseum.org/get-involved

Phnom Penh, Cambodia surprised us and wasn't at all what we expected. Today, we find the BEST things we did in Phnom Penh, Cambodia, and break down our amazing experience.

This video will take you through Phnom Penh's top attractions, hidden gems, and local hotspots from our perspective. From visiting historic landmarks like the Royal Palace and Wat Phnom to indulging in the city's vibrant street food scene and buzzing nightlife. 

► Subscribe - www.youtube.com/c/TheDetourDuo
► Find Us On Social Media - beacons.ai/thedetourduo

Find us on Patreon if you'd like!:) ✌️
► patreon.com/TheDetourDuo

How we travel around the globe for half the cost. Click HERE:
► www.dailydrop.com/pro?via=detour50

Wonder where we get our music? Click HERE: 
► www.musicbed.com/invite/9CGB4
►artlist.io/referral/9e66640b-466c-471e-abe6-6161f6fbc80d

What's in this video:
Traveling on a Budget: How expensive is Cambodia?
Exploring Culture: Night Markets, Bassac Lane, and S-21
Tourist Attractions: The Royal Palace & Wat Phnom 

#phnompenh #phnompenhcitytour #cambodia #phnompenhcambodia 

THANK YOU FOR WATCHING ✌️
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🌍 About us: Hey, we're Sara & Tony, The Detour Duo – adventurers, storytellers, and lovers of all things travel. Join us as we detour around the world in search of the hidden gems, local stories, and the magic of travel

✅ For inquiries/collaborations contact us at detourduocontact@gmail.com

⏰ 𝘿𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙨:
Time of Visit: February 2023

📷 𝙂𝙚𝙖𝙧:
www.amazon.com/shop/thedetour_duo
Main camera: Sony A7SIII
Lens: Sigma 24-70 F2.8
Side camera: DJI Osmo Pocket 3
Side camera 2: Insta360 X4
Microphone: Hollyland Lark M2
Drone: DJI Mini 4 Pro

📎 Affiliate Links: 
I LOVE this brand for lightweight clothing. It's called KETL Mountain Apparel and specializes in fabrics that are great for humidity. Use the link https://ketlmtn.com/?ref=TaketheDetour  🩳

📌 𝙏𝙞𝙢𝙚𝙨𝙩𝙖𝙢𝙥𝙨:
00:00 The streets of Cambodia are lively
01:42 Cambodia vs the USA - breakfast edition
04:19 Cambodia is incredibly inexpensive + Wat Phnom
07:18 The Tuk Tuk Scam here + The Royal Palace
10:39 The infamous Bassac Lane
13:46 Tuol Sleng (S-21)
15:55 Phnom Penh Night Market 
17:27 Choeung Ek (The Killing Fields)
